name: Lemon-Coconut Filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together sugar and cornstarch in a saucepan.
2. Add boiling water and lemon juice; stir in coconut until well combined.
3. Place the saucepan over high heat and bring to a full boil, stirring frequently.
4. Reduce the heat slightly and continue boiling for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
5. Remove from heat and stir in butter until smooth.
6. Allow the mixture to cool to room temperature before spreading between cake layers.
